description: A plain candid photograph from a community Labor Day / patriotic parade, with no added graphic design or on-image text. In the foreground a smiling woman with reddish hair, white sunglasses, and a blue t-shirt holds a young toddler girl (in a navy dress with white polka dots and a white hair bow) who is holding a small handheld American flag. The street setting includes a large waving American flag at left, brick downtown buildings with a fire escape, a 25 mph speed-limit sign, a blue parade banner, and other parade-goers including children in bright yellow-green shirts and a person pushing a stroller. Bright sunny daylight. There is no real designed slogan on the image. The tweet caption frames it as 'the first Labor Day in the GOLDEN AGE,' but the image itself is documentary photography, not a designed meme/poster.
